name: Animal Facts 01
description: Extreme animal abilities, biology, and strange natural records
author: rewouh

items.title: only mammal capable of true flight
items.mnemonic: BAT = “Born Airborne Truly.” Imagine a bat laughing at penguins and ostriches because it is the only mammal truly flying through the night sky.

items.title: world's fastest bird
items.mnemonic: Peregrine = rapid PEREGRINation (“peregrination” = traveling fast far). See that falcon going faster than planes? It's peregrinating!

items.title: number of hearts of an octopus
items.mnemonic: OC-TO-PUS, three syllables, three hearts. Each syllable making one heartbeat: OC 💓 TO 💓 PUS 💓.

items.title: animal with the longest tongue
items.mnemonic: GI-RAFFE = “GIant ReAch.” Picture a giraffe licking leaves of absurdly high trees with a tongue longer than a ladder.

items.title: loudest animal on Earth
items.mnemonic: Imagine a sperm whale opening its mouth and producing a shockwave so loud it cracks submarine windows and vibrates the entire ocean. Maybe the Titanic did not sink because of iceberg, uh?

items.title: animal with the largest brain relative to its body size
items.mnemonic: Flipper was smart right? Think about Flipper, he must have had a HUGE brain.

items.title: animal with the longest lifespan
items.mnemonic: Sponge is squishy, glass is hard. What do you obtain when you combine both? You obviously break the matrix, it's now unbreakable (well, nearly: 10000-15000 years).

items.title: land mammal with the most teeth
items.mnemonic: He is ARMed with teeth. Picture an armadillo smiling with all these teeth, looking you right in the eyes. He is also giant, so looking down on you.

items.title: animal immune to cancer
items.mnemonic: They're so small they could probably be fighting the cancer cells themselves. See those tiny wrinkled naked mole rats punching away cancer cells?

items.title: bovine that has larger lungs and heart to endure higher altitudes
items.mnemonic: A yak definitely does not need a sherpa. Picture it climbing the Himalayas effortlessly while humans collapse from lack of oxygen. Its heart pounds like an engine that can be heard from everywhere.
